title: Aurora Cannabis Inc Stock Analysis and Financial Data
text: StockAnalysis provides detailed financial analysis and valuation metrics for Aurora Cannabis. Company financial statements: Complete income statement data with revenue, COGS, operating expenses, EBITDA. Balance sheet analysis showing assets, liabilities, equity. Cash flow statements detailing operating, investing, financing activities. Valuation metrics: Current price-to-earnings ratio. Price-to-sales multiples. Price-to-book ratios. Enterprise value calculations. Dividend information (if applicable). Historical financial performance: 5-year revenue trends showing growth trajectory. Gross margin expansion trends. Operating leverage demonstrated through EBITDA growth. Free cash flow generation trends. Financial ratios: Return on equity analysis. Return on assets metrics. Debt-to-equity ratios. Current and quick ratios. Working capital efficiency. Segment analysis: Medical cannabis revenue and margin trends. Consumer cannabis declining contribution. Plant propagation Bevo financial metrics. Geographic breakdown: Canadian vs. international revenue split. International market revenue acceleration evident in recent quarters. International margins vs. Canadian domestic business comparison. Peer comparison: Aurora metrics compared to Canopy Growth and Tilray. Relative valuation positioning within cannabis sector. Growth rate comparisons to peer group. Profitability path comparisons.
